message:
fix(node): bound 13 unbounded collections across 11 files to prevent memory exhaustion

Deep code review of agent commits found 13 Vec fields that could grow
without limit under sustained load. Each now uses oldest-first eviction
(drain(0..overflow)) when exceeding a 4096-entry cap:

- rollback_bundle: events (6 push sites)
- cancellation_protocol: records
- epoch_transition_barrier: history (2 push sites)
- evidence_replay_gate: evidence_store + replay_log (5 push sites)
- optimization_governor: events + audit_log
- evidence_emission: action_log (7 push sites)
- integrity_sweep_scheduler: decisions
- update_copilot: interactions
- quarantine_controller: evidence_log + action_log
- trust_complexity: decisions + replay_results
- category_shift: history

Also reviewed 135 files changed by other agents since last known good
commit — all changes verified correct (bounded collections, NaN guards,
ct_eq timing fixes, fail-closed boundaries, borrow checker fixes).

7397 tests pass, 0 failures. Clippy clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
